apps.name: My Today Lucky Number
apps.description: Discover your personalised lucky number every day. Fun, uplifting, and a great way to start your morning with a positive mindset.

apps.name: Viyali Notes
apps.description: Quickly record inspiration, protect your privacy, and access your notes anywhere. Simple, fast, and encrypted.

apps.name: Suggestion plus
apps.description: Collect anonymous suggestions from your team, friends and family. Build a culture of honest feedback — no names, no pressure, just real ideas.

apps.name: Findy Plus
apps.description: Smart family tracking with privacy-first location sharing. Always know your loved ones are safe — without compromising their privacy.

apps.name: Drink Water Tracker
apps.description: Log every sip in one tap, get smart reminders around your schedule, and track your daily and monthly hydration — effortlessly.
